meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve tutorial hell (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome tutorial hell. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity Template to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Break free from tutorial hell. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to build production-ready SaaS MVPs faster than ever.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop watching and start shipping. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you gain a production-hardened boilerplate that handles authentication, database schema, and API routing. Combine this with Claude Code to automate boilerplate generation, allowing you to focus purely on your product's unique value proposition.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks consuming endless video loops, building to-do lists that serve no market, and chasing the phantom of 'readiness.' Every tutorial feels like progress, but your repository remains empty, and your revenue sits at zero. You are trapped in the most expensive cycle for a founder: the illusion of productivity without the reality of a product.

It is time to pivot from consumer to creator. The Antigravity template is not just code; it is a battle-tested architecture designed to bypass the 'getting started' phase. By integrating Claude Code, we treat your codebase as a living entity, turning complex feature requests into deployed reality in minutes, not days.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundation of your SaaS. This step ensures you have the necessary architecture, including database ORM and authentication middleware, pre-configured for deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project using the Antigravity standard template. Include PostgreSQL setup, Clerk authentication, and Stripe billing integration.

steps.title: Define Your Schema for Market Fit
steps.description: Map your business logic to your database. Avoid generic examples; focus on the data entities that provide actual value to your paying users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a database schema for a subscription-based SaaS. Include tables for User, Subscription, and ProjectAnalytics. Ensure proper relational constraints.

steps.title: Automate API Route Generation
steps.description: Stop writing CRUD boilerplate. Use Claude Code to generate type-safe API endpoints that adhere to your new database schema.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate secure Next.js API routes for the ProjectAnalytics model using the Antigravity standards. Include validation and error handling.

steps.title: Build the Founder Dashboard
steps.description: Create a high-impact UI that shows key metrics. Focus on speed and conversion-oriented design principles.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a dashboard component that displays ProjectAnalytics. Use Tailwind CSS for a modern, clean, professional SaaS look.

steps.title: Deploy to Production Environment
steps.description: Move your local prototype to a live URL. Validate your MVP with real users to begin the feedback loop.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Prepare the project for production deployment on Vercel. Configure environment variables and optimize build settings for performance.

pro_tips: Never manually write boilerplate code; if you find yourself typing standard imports or repetitive interfaces, prompt Claude Code to generate a reusable snippet.
Prioritize your database schema before writing a single line of UI code; your data model dictates your business viability.
Use Antigravity's built-in testing suite early—if a feature can't be tested, it shouldn't be in your MVP.
Always wrap your external API calls in a dedicated service layer; it makes swapping providers (like Stripe for LemonSqueezy) trivial later.
Treat your CLI history as your project documentation; periodically review your Claude Code logs to understand how your app architecture evolved.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, focus on the 'Build-Measure-Learn' loop. Gather feedback from the first five users, refine the core value prop, and use Claude Code to iterate on user requests within 24 hours.
content.conversion_block: You have the architecture and the automated workflow. Now, stop iterating in a vacuum and start shipping to real customers. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
